description: Kill preventable support demand: identify recurring call classes caused by missing info or process, fix upstream (welcome pack, docs, packaging, defaults), and set simple human contact patterns that reduce friction.

examples.context: Almost every new system triggered a call for factory admin password.
examples.resolution: Welcome pack in box with password and reset steps. That ticket class collapsed.

examples.context: Customers assumed anonymous random support. Team was real regional.
examples.resolution: Open with thanks and location. Trust and patience up on hard calls.

examples.context: Pack shipped; need proof for leadership.
examples.resolution: Before/after volume shown. Budget for next kill approved.
